chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 879 of 2024 (Arsalan versus The State) Date Order with signature of Judges 1. For orders on MA No.5310/24 2. For hearing of bail application 02.05.2024 Mr. M. Sharif Akhunzada, advocate for the applicant Mr. Muhammad Anwar Mahar, DDPP for the State ----------------------------------- It is contended by learned counsel for the applicant that besides his involvement in certain cases at Karachi in which he has been admitted to bail is involved in one more case (FIR No.995/2023 u/s 489-F PPC of PS Bakhar City) at Punjab. By stating so, he sought the release of the applicant on transitory bail for a limited period to make him enable to seek pre-arrest bail from the Court having jurisdiction at Bakhar City Punjab, which is opposed by learned DDPP for the State by contending that the applicant has not yet been formally arrested in a case in which he is required by a Court at Bakhar City. Heard arguments and perused the record. If the applicant is wanted by a Court at Bakhar City Punjab, then he makes an application seeking for issuance of his production order from that Court through his counsel. If it is done, then it would amount to joining of his trial and then he would be at liberty to seek his release on bail as per law by filing such application pending disposal of his case before that Court. No case for his release on transitory bail by this Court by way of the instant Crl. Bail Application is made out; it is dismissed. J U D G E
